zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：低位震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前艾达币美元处于低位震荡结构，价格0.1448略低于20日均线0.1451附近，短线仍偏弱但有企稳迹象，24小时小幅反弹显示多空拉锯加剧。

MACD持续位于零轴下方至-0.00033，空头动能仍占优但柱体收敛，短期下跌动能减弱。RSI未给出但从价格结构看尚未进入超卖区。

下方支撑关注0.1438近期低点，其次0.1420整数关口；上方阻力位于0.1456前高及0.1465均线压力区，突破需量能配合。

操作建议以区间震荡思路为主，未有效突破0.1456前不宜追多，回踩支撑附近可轻仓试多，止损设于0.1420下方控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently showing a mildly constructive but fragile short-term structure after a modest 0.52% gain. Price is hovering just below the 20-period SMA at 0.14507865, suggesting the market is attempting a recovery but has not confirmed bullish continuation. The tight 24-hour range indicates consolidation rather than directional conviction, with liquidity clustering around intraday equilibrium levels.

Momentum signals remain slightly bearish beneath the surface. The MACD reading at -0.00033299292 indicates lingering downside momentum, even though price has stabilized near the upper boundary of the recent range. Without a visible signal line, confirmation is limited, but the negative MACD bias suggests rallies may still face selling pressure unless momentum improves. This reflects a corrective phase rather than a trend reversal.

From a structure perspective, immediate support is forming near 0.1438–0.1440, aligned with the recent 24-hour low and repeated intraday demand reactions. A breakdown below this zone would likely expose lower liquidity pockets. On the upside, resistance is concentrated around 0.1456, followed by a stronger ceiling near 0.1465–0.1470, where prior rejection zones and overhead supply may intensify.

Trading conditions favor range-based strategies until a breakout confirms direction. Buying near support with tight risk control may be viable, but upside follow-through requires a decisive close above 0.1456 and sustained momentum. Conversely, failure to reclaim the SMA could lead to continued sideways-to-bearish drift, making patience essential before committing to trend-following positions.
